column6: Eczema. Some sensory issues. Sometimes likes to keep arms covered.
ASD, ADHD, generalised anxiety, some sensory issues that may impact ability to tolerate application of make up/prosthetics.

column2: Incident 05/11- Inappropriate conversation.Discussing the fact that her Dad was dead and he died of an overdose. Stating that her mum was also a junkie and would probably die soon.
Action - I stated that this was a very sad fact and actively changed the conversation to a subject that was more focused on the art work being created.
